description_long: This airplane features a futuristic, angular design with a predominantly gray exterior accented by subtle green highlights. The wings are sharply swept and mounted high on the fuselage, with upward-angled tips that give the aircraft a dynamic, aggressive profile. The central fuselage is faceted and tapers toward the rear, while the cockpit is positioned at the front and appears to be enclosed with a dark, windowed canopy. The tail section is compact and integrated into the main body, lacking a traditional vertical stabilizer but featuring a raised, fin-like structure. The landing gear is visible beneath the fuselage, with two main gear units and a smaller nose gear, all of which appear to be fixed. The overall appearance suggests a high-performance, possibly unmanned or advanced piloted aircraft suitable for urban or near-urban environments.
description: A sleek, angular gray airplane with high-mounted swept wings, green accents, and a forward-enclosed cockpit. The design is futuristic, with visible fixed landing gear and a compact, finned tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sharply swept high wings, forward cockpit canopy, and visible landing gear beneath the fuselage.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the right wing's upward angle and the faceted fuselage contours.
description_view_2: Rear-angled view highlighting the raised tail fin structure and the symmetry of the wing configuration.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view showing the left wing's upward tip and the overall compactness of the tail section.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and upward-angled winglets; no visible dihedral or anhedral.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet intake visible at the back of the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Integrated tail with a single raised fin structure; lacks a conventional vertical stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle fixed landing gear with two main units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a dark canopy, likely single-seat.
